text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's way past our slotted time for training, and
Agnes Tachyon still hasn't shown up. Guess I
should just go home.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, okay, I'll use the concoction I'm currently
testing with the other experiment...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That would allow me to validate that other
research project at the same time... That's right,
while I'm at it, there's still...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Trainer! Why didn't you come and get me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's because of you that it's already night! All the experiments I wanted to conduct today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was so engrossed in her preparations, she lost
track of time. I give her a tiny lecture, and though
she sulks, she seems to reflect on the situation
well enough.
